title: 2011 Trailer Music over Disc 5
description: Replaces Disc 5 with "Only Human" by Olive Musique, The Music of Vareide's 2011 Minecraft Trailer.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/MmB9b5njVbA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Let's go to a place where everything is made of blocks.
- Replaces Disc 5 with "Only Human" by Olive Musique, The Music of Vareide's 2011 Minecraft Trailer.
- Disc is updated to share the color scheme of minecraft.net circa 2011.
- Disc Fragment also updated.
- Note: As music length is hard-coded, redstone signal and music particles will last around 20 seconds longer after the end of the song.
  
![New Disc and Disc Fragment Textures.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f961f8583aaf48908c4cbfcab7dd9a62e9bace15.png)

### Credits
- "Only Human" by Serge "Olive Musique" Essiambre: [Link to Their Work](https://www.premiumbeat.com/artist/olive-musique)
- Trailer by Dennis Vareide: [Original Trailer](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3rhYLe4Q-IU)
